---
title: "Polyaxial Cannulated Pedicle Screws"
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
Part of the **sizing + final product** group &middot; 5,997 items
:::

Polyaxial Cannulated Pedicle Screws are specialised screws designed to anchor bone grafts and implants into the spine, allowing the screw to be placed at a slight angle to maximise stability while reducing the risk of damage to surrounding tissues. This collection contains roughly six thousand distinct items, each engineered to fit a range of clinical needs across spinal surgery.

## Sample Products

| Product |
|---------|
| MediRod Pedicle Screw System - ti pedicle screw 6x25mm yellow |
| CD HORIZON® Spinal System - SCREW 55890008545 5.5/6.0 RMAS 8.5X45 |
| Coral - Solid Polyaxial Screw, 5.50mm x 20mm |
| CREO - CREO Preferred Angle Screw, 9.5-8.0x110mm, Cannulated, DOD, CoCr Head, Ti Shank |
| Tandry Compression Screw System - 4.7mm Compression Cannulated Screw, 90mm |

## Related Categories

**In the sizing + final product group:**

- [Orthopedic Instruments & Implants](orthopedic-instruments-implants.qmd) (3,152 items)
- [Spinal Interbody Cages](spinal-interbody-cages.qmd) (2,898 items)
- [Polyaxial Cannulated Trial Plates](polyaxial-cannulated-trial-plates.qmd) (1,096 items)

<button class="btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm" onclick="askChat('Polyaxial Cannulated Pedicle Screws')">
  Ask about this category
</button>
